title: Add structured Human Decision Request schema

sources.reason: Defines Work Item 1 schema fields, implementation boundary, and required tests.
Current Preflight Review report and rendering behavior.
Current governance status compression and human-facing output integration.
Current policy fields for Preflight Review behavior.
Current blocking ceilings that must accommodate the planned schema and test additions without disabling the guard.
Existing Preflight Review behavior and validation tests.

problemStatement: needs_human_confirmation currently exposes a generic recommendation and machine-oriented decision drivers but does not provide a structured human decision request with the context needed to choose and resume safely.

scenarioCoverage.reason: This bounded schema-only Work Item is low risk; behavior is covered by Acceptance evidence and focused tests.

riskAssessment.reason: The change adds a structured, validated report object and human-readable rendering without changing implementation gates or resume behavior.

executionDecision.reason: The user confirmed execution of the reviewed plan and this Work Item has a bounded implementation and verification scope.

preReviewWarnings: Review that the schema remains generic and does not silently enable a workflow gate or resume protocol.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A needs_human_confirmation report contains decisionId, status, whatHappened, whyItMatters, options, recommendedOption, recommendationReason, question, and resumeCondition.
Each decision option contains a stable id, human-readable label, and effect, and the recommendedOption references one declared option.
Focused regression tests cover the structured report object, invalid schema data, and human-readable rendering while existing Preflight and governance-compression behavior remains compatible.
The files docs/contract-fields.md and .ai/cockpit/README.md describe the schema fields and pause-state semantics without claiming that this Work Item implements the Human Decision Gate.
The governance complexity guard keeps blocking behavior enabled while its ceilings are calibrated above the measured post-change totals.
guidelines: Keep the Human Decision Request schema generic and agent-agnostic.
Document all new report fields and preserve existing report fields for backward compatibility.
Do not implement gate enforcement or resume behavior in this Work Item.

intent.problem: When Preflight pauses for human confirmation, the current output does not give a person a complete, structured choice to make.
constraints: Keep the schema generic and agent-agnostic.
Preserve existing report fields and current advisory gate behavior.
Do not implement gate enforcement or resume behavior in this Work Item.
intent.rationale: A stable request object lets later gate and resume work consume explicit human-facing evidence without inferring decisions from prose.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized execution of the confirmed implementation plan; this Work Item updates the Cockpit documentation path within its declared scope.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
